stemHtml: As part of the safeguarding of ILS signals during ILS operations, the ILS critical area is best described by which of the following options?

options.a: An area of defined dimensions around the localiser and glide path antennas where vehicles, including aircraft, are excluded during all ILS operations.
options.b: An area around the localiser and glide path antennas where the movement of vehicles, except aircraft, is controlled during CAT II and III operations.
options.c: The entire area within the aerodrome boundary where the movement of any vehicle, including aircraft, is excluded at all times during ILS operations.
options.d: The entire area within the aerodrome boundary where the movement of vehicles, including aircraft, is controlled during CAT II and III operations.
